word: H3726 - כְּפַר הָעַמֹּונִי - Kᵉphar hâ-ʻAmmôwnîy - kef-ar' haw-am-monee' - Chefarhaamonai

sections.paragraph:
Original: כּפר העמּוני

Transliteration: kephar hâ‛ammônı̂y

Phonetic: kef-ar' haw-am-mo-nee'

BDB Definition:

Chephar-haammonai = "village of the Ammonites"
  1. a village in Benjamin

Origin: from H3723 and H5984, with the article interposed

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
